description:
Control a Windows PC over the network or serial port.

MCE Controller lets you control a Windows PC — Windows Media Center and beyond — over
the network (TCP/IP) or a serial port. It runs as a server that receives text commands
and turns them into keystrokes, mouse actions, launched programs, window activations,
and power/shutdown actions, with a configurable command set.
What's Changed
- docs: fix #218 - dead release process, corrupted diagrams, wrong versioning/threading claims, false coverage numbers by @tig in #263
- fix: produce ambiguous-selector, stale-element, and elevation errors; mark focus/foreground reserved by @tig in #262
- Agent settings tab: session provisioning opt-in and management (#259) by @tig in #264
- feat: session lifecycle tools + per-call sessionId routing (#86 Phase 3) by @tig in #265
Full Changelog: v3.0.14...v3.0.15
